title: kibara roemeri
side_effects: Kibara roemeri can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, improper use of the plant may cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and lowered blood pressure. In severe cases, it can even cause seizures or coma in individuals with pre-existing medical conditions.
